description:
Our eBay Store: https://ebay.us/RGj1W6
Check out our other social media and product links: https://linktr.ee/shedflips

Full day of garage sale reseller hauls — we hit a wild $5 fill-a-bag sale (yes, actual garbage bags — fill them as full as you can close them), scored a pair of Fry boots for $10, grabbed Pioneer Woman throw blankets for $2.50 each, a waxed canvas backpack, an Enjoi skateboard deck, Hoka and Adidas sneakers, and walked out with a binder stack of hundreds of DVDs for $10. Under $100 total spend on the whole day and a serious pile of eBay inventory to list. If you're into reseller hauls, garage sale pickups, or figuring out what's worth grabbing at bag sales and thrifts, this is a full workday breakdown with real prices and real resale expectations.

⏱️ TIMESTAMPS
00:00 Intro — what we bought today
00:23 Arriving at the $5 Fill-A-Bag garage sale
01:18 Filling up two garbage bags with craft supplies
02:46 Paying for both bags ($10 total)
03:03 Back at the shed — sorting through the bags
04:15 Needle point kits, buttons, thread, yarn strategy
05:42 Waxed canvas backpack with leather straps ($10 — Lonnie's keeper)
06:30 Enjoi skateboard deck ($3)
07:24 Prince Royal 03 tennis racket ($3)
08:16 Food Lovers 12-Day Transformation diet kit ($10)
09:12 Vintage Bibles ($1 each)
09:38 🔥 FRY BOOTS for $10 (the deal of the day)
10:04 Hoka running shoes — wide sole ($6)
10:32 Under Armour tactical boots ($5)
10:53 Adidas Alpha Bounce — his size ($3)
11:11 Officially licensed Pink Floyd hat ($4)
11:34 Pioneer Woman throw blankets ($2.50 each)
12:52 Newsboys band drumsticks ($2)
13:17 Hundreds of DVDs in binder sleeves — $10 lot strategy

If you like reseller workday content, full garage sale hauls, and behind-the-scenes eBay listing strategy, subscribe and hit the bell. We're full-time eBay resellers and we post real numbers, real finds, and real mistakes every week.

#GarageSaleHaul #ResellerHaul #EbayReseller #ShedFlips #FillABagSale
